title: Bynarrian jig
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''[[Bynarria system/Legends|Bynarrian]] jig''' was a kind of dance performed on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]] by [[Alexsandr Badure|Badure]] while he was looking for the [[Queen of Ranroon/Legends|''Queen of Ranroon'']] in the company of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and his comrades.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-12-08 -->{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/ximweek02/index.html|text=Xim Week: ''The Despotica'' (Part I)|int=Xim Week: The Despotica}}
